title: mentha longifolia subsp. diabolina
intro: Mentha longifolia subsp. diabolina, also known as Woolly Mint or Wild Mint, is a subspecies of the Mentha longifolia plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia subsp. diabolina include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and alleviation of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
